'''鈭歾h-b-n-n''' ('''kazhabnenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:questionize|questionize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:questionize|questionize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-b-n-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazhabnenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhabnenoko|thizhabnenoko]] || [[word:jizhabnenoko|jizhabnenoko]] || [[word:shizhabnenoko|shizhabnenoko]] || [[word:kizhabnenoko|kizhabnenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
